CustomThumbnail.title: CustomThumbnail
CustomThumbnail.description: Custom social sharing thumbnail and card layout configuration for a client

image.description: Base64 data-URL of the custom thumbnail image

posX.description: Horizontal position of the focal point or logo

posY.description: Vertical position of the focal point or logo

custom_thumbnails/{clientId}.description: Durable storage of custom social share thumbnails per client
